creator: vpetrjaev@yandex.ru
text:
Hello!

 

My proposal, to close request.

 

UTF-8 looks fine in logs, in case of -8 flag for syslogd specified.

For example, in rc.conf:

syslogd_flags="-8"

 

 

Example:

Default settings: 

Oct 26 11:38:25 srv fetchmail[1487]: awakened at Ă—.M-^BĂŹ.M-^@ĂŽĂ‰Ă‹, 26
ĂŹĂ‹.M-^B.M-^OĂ‚.M-^@.M-^O 2010 Ă‡. 11:38:25

Oct 26 11:38:26 srv fetchmail[1487]: sleeping at Ă—.M-^BĂŹ.M-^@ĂŽĂ‰Ă‹, 26
ĂŹĂ‹.M-^B.M-^OĂ‚.M-^@.M-^O 2010 Ă‡. 11:38:26 for 120 seconds

 

-8 flag specified:

Oct 26 11:42:27 srv fetchmail[1487]: awakened at Ă—Ă”ĂŹĂ’ĂŽĂ‰Ă‹, 26 ĂŹĂ‹Ă”Ă‘Ă‚Ă’Ă‘ 2010 Ă‡.
11:42:27

Oct 26 11:42:27 srv fetchmail[1487]: sleeping at Ă—Ă”ĂŹĂ’ĂŽĂ‰Ă‹, 26 ĂŹĂ‹Ă”Ă‘Ă‚Ă’Ă‘ 2010 Ă‡.
11:42:27 for 120 seconds

 

 

Best regards, Vadim
